text.title: llm-judge-rubric-evidence-first Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing profile → decision-record → emitted artefact for llm-judge-rubric-evidence-first.

example.title: Canonical end-to-end run
example.input-profile: # templates/_smoke-test.yaml input — see that file for live shape.

step-trace.step: Step 1: profile parsed; all required drivers present.
Step 2: decision tree walked; landed on the default-branch leaf with rule citation.
Step 3: 2-3 plausible alternatives recorded under rejected[] with one-sentence reasons.
Step 4: working template rendered with concrete values.

example.commentary: Replace placeholders with concrete values from your profile; the structure above is the canonical happy path enforced by the validator.
